objective: Select and live-revalidate the exact HCM-0.1 documentation handoff, then produce a bounded dispatch for the fresh independent docs-only control-pack review required to close HCM-0.1.

sections: Phase 1 — Profile and artifact semantic kernel
Phase 3 — Vocabulary, Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, and projections
Intake record and artifact candidate contracts
Project posture kernel and recommendation contracts

work_completed: Selected the exact handoff and verified that its canonical record and unique ledger entry agree.
Confirmed Snapshot Memory is not implemented and used manual live revalidation with null snapshot/delta/projection refs.
Revalidated the relevant control-pack layering and current fixed-artifact, Charter-authoring, posture-precursor, and absent target-type implementation claims against the live tree.
Classified the next action as proof_or_review_followup and wrote one bounded review-only dispatch.

deliverables.summary: Ready-to-run fresh independent HCM-0.1 docs-only control-pack review dispatch.

decisions.summary: Dispatch a fresh independent review-only session; if it finds any actionable issue, leave HCM-0.1 open and route remediation to a separate docs session.
decisions.authority_effect: The review may satisfy only the HCM-0.1 control-pack proof gate; it may not promote runtime seams or authorize Rust.

decisions.summary: The selected handoff is partially stale only in recorded git state: its formerly dirty changes are now committed on the feature branch; its semantic conclusions and review requirement remain valid.
decisions.authority_effect: This orchestration record supersedes the source routing state while preserving its documented semantic decisions and unresolved HCM-0.6 default-set authority.

findings.summary: HCM-0.1 remains open until a fresh independent reviewer evaluates the complete control-pack proof gate and records a clean result.

validation.command: Selected handoff record/index uniqueness and jq validation
Live GitNexus reindex and bounded query of artifact, Charter/posture, and snapshot seams
Manual live source/asset revalidation at current HEAD
Dispatch shape and orchestration handoff/ledger schema checks

next_session.objective: Run the dispatched fresh independent docs-only review of the complete HCM-0.1 control pack and close HCM-0.1 only if no actionable findings remain.
allowed_scope: Read-only review of the dispatch-named control-pack/live files
prohibited_scope: Rust, tests, core asset, installed-skill, or control-pack edits
Starting later design or implementation slices
acceptance_criteria: Fresh reviewer independently revalidates live truth and every HCM-0.1 control-pack proof requirement.
Review is findings-first and reports precise actionable issues or an explicit clean result.
HCM-0.1 closes only on a clean durable review handoff; all implementation gates remain open.
stop_conditions: Any actionable finding leaves HCM-0.1 open and routes a separate docs-only remediation.
Any unresolved authority boundary is escalated rather than inferred.
No shipped default is selected and no Rust work begins.

chat_summary: Selected and live-revalidated the HCM-0.1 docs handoff, classified the next action as proof_or_review_followup, and wrote a bounded fresh independent review dispatch. Snapshot grounding is honestly not available; no Rust changed.
